name: Elisium Aqua 1200

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: A1CFCBC6-2BF3-4030-B6B1-70B3A5EEAAED

comment:
Elisium 1200 Aqua
Brand: Lotus Light
Origin: Germany
Light source: 1200W LED module, lifespan >20,000 hours
Color temperature: 6000K
16 million color LCD display: Easy to use, clearly displays operating status
CMY + CTO system: Smooth color mixing, linear color temperature adjustment
LED cutting system: 4 independently adjustable cutting blades, ±60° rotation
Electric aperture: Linear zoom from 5% to 100%, macro effect
Rated power: 1400W with PFC
Operating voltage: AC90-260V / 50-60Hz
Positioning technology: Hall + encoder combination, absolute position memory, self-correction
Body design: Fire-retardant ABS plastic, high-strength cold-pressed alloy
Lamp dimensions (LxWxH): 430 x 335 x 840 mm
Net weight: 41kg
